title: Cosmos Pinwheel — spinning colour-blade pinwheel
title_vi: Cosmos Pinwheel — chong chóng nhiều màu xoay
summary: A cheerful pinwheel of twelve curved colour blades in the Cosmos accents spinning around a glowing hub and gently breathing. Pure Canvas 2D, zero deps, runs offline; deterministic and seamless.
usage_notes: RUN: double-click index.html. KEY TECHNIQUES: twelve quadratic-curve blades fanned around the centre, each filled with a radial accent gradient; the whole wheel rotates 2π·u (one integer turn per LOOP) and breathes via sin(2π·u·2), with an additive glowing hub. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 + window.__seek(t). TUNE: blade count N, curl, AC colours.
summary_vi: Một chiếc chong chóng vui mắt gồm 12 cánh cong nhiều màu theo bảng accent Cosmos, xoay quanh trục sáng và 'thở' nhẹ. Thuần Canvas 2D, không lib, chạy offline; deterministic & loop liền.
notes: Effect #150 — Ra tự viết (mốc 150!). 12 cánh quadratic, xoay 2π·u + breathe sin → seamless.
